headline: 79th World Health Assembly opens in Geneva (18–23 May); Walk the Talk event draws participants to Place des Nations this morning.
summary: The WHA convenes with the US having formally withdrawn from WHO, leaving a ~$600M funding gap and forcing a 20% budget cut for 2026–27; finalisation of the Pandemic Agreement's Pathogen Access and Benefit-Sharing (PABS) system tops the agenda.

headline: "No 10 million Swiss" initiative: record CHF 15.52M total campaign spend declared; polls show neck-and-neck race with 14 June vote four weeks out.
summary: The SVP-backed sustainability initiative would cap Switzerland's permanent population below 10 million until 2050.

headline: US Federal Reserve terminates Archegos-era enforcement orders against UBS Group AG and three Credit Suisse entities.
summary: The July 2023 cease-and-desist order — imposed for Credit Suisse's "unsafe and unsound counterparty credit-risk management" in the Archegos Capital collapse — is lifted effective 15 May 2026; UBS had previously paid ~$387M in fines.

headline: African swine fever: Swiss government assesses spread risk to Switzerland as high
summary: following the first fresh outbreak in Italian domestic pigs in April 2026, after years of declining EU case counts.

headline: Trump-Xi Beijing summit closes with "strategic stability" framework, 200-jet Boeing deal, and sharpened Taiwan warning.
summary: The two-day state visit (14–15 May) produced agreement in principle on expanded US market access into China and a September return summit in the US.

headline: Gaza: ceasefire implementer Mladenov warns "dangerous status quo" as Israeli control expands from 53% to 64% of territory.
summary: Board of Peace director-general Nikolay Mladenov, at his first Jerusalem press briefing since taking office in January, said a stalled phase two risks the "yellow line" hardening into a permanent division.

headline: Strait of Hormuz: shipping at ~5% of pre-crisis volume; US Operation Project Freedom paused pending Iran deal review.
summary: The de-facto blockade has been in force since late February 2026 following US-Israel strikes on Iran.

headline: Macron pledges €23bn at "Africa Forward" summit in Nairobi, explicitly pivoting away from Sahel states that expelled French forces.
summary: The summit met for the first time in an Anglophone country; €14bn from French public/private funds and €9bn from African partners target energy transition, agriculture, and AI — replacing the security-first patronage model of past France-Africa summits.

headline: India-Pakistan ceasefire at one year: fragile but holding.
summary: May 10, 2026 marks one year since the US-brokered ceasefire ended Operation Sindoor; analysts describe the peace as functional but note the Kashmir dispute is unresolved and mutual suspicion persists.

headline: Sharpest-ever direct image of a cosmic web filament: 3-million-light-year gas strand linking twin quasars captured in emission.
summary: A team led by the University of Milano-Bicocca and Max Planck Institute for Astrophysics spent hundreds of telescope hours resolving the intergalactic bridge connecting two quasar-hosting galaxies ~12 billion years old.

headline: 2.6-million-year-old Paranthropus jaw from Ethiopia's Mille-Logya extends the genus >600 miles north of its previous limit.
summary: University of Chicago-led team published in _Nature_; the find confirms multiple early hominin lineages overlapped across a wider geography than previously mapped, challenging linear models of human evolution.

headline: Chemogenetic tool mitoDREADD-Gs reverses dementia memory deficits in mice without clearing amyloid or tau.
summary: Inserm/University of Bordeaux team (with U.

headline: Brown-fat enzyme TNAP activates alternative thermogenesis pathway via a glycerol-binding pocket; implications for bone disease.
summary: McGill University study in _Nature_ (12 May 2026) identifies a structural switch in brown adipocyte enzyme TNAP; preserving healthy fat-tissue function — not merely reducing fat mass — emerges as a therapeutic target.

summary: Last data: Nikkei 225 ~62,400 (–0.47%) and Hang Seng flat on 12 May 2026.
